calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-23-2015 Off Calendar

Mcmillan Bros. Electric, Inc.S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-22-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, proceedings reported by: Sonia Wong, CSR#11288.

Justin A. Mallory, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, MCMILLAN BROS ELECTRIC, INC., a California Corporation.
Plaintiff's Oral Request for Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement is granted.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) MARINERS SYSTEMS, INC. AKA MARSYS, A PURPORTED CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-50 dismissed without prejudice.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $34,838.12
Pre-Judgment Interest: $7,099.32
Attorney's Fees: $18,841.00
Costs: $706.85
Total Judgment in the amount of $75,580.79
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-18-2015 Continued To Oct-07-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-08-2015 Continued To Jun-03-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
